features: 🎁【Perfect Fit for All Kit】A box contains 30 stick on fake nails, 1 sheet of glue stickers, 1 mini nail file and 1 small wooden stick. Available in 12 sizes, they can fit any nail shape or size. Select the false nail that suits you the best, trim and file it to your preference, and create a glittering effect at home, without spending half an hour or paying expensive charges for a manicure service at a nail salon.

♻️【High Material】These french tip press on nails are crafted from high-quality ABS material, with a distinctive micro-thickening design, eco-friendly and sturdy, which is harmless to your nails and well-being. You don't have to fret about nail cracks, since they possess equal toughness and elasticity as natural nails. The pattern print is bright and does not fade quickly, providing a long-lasting and comfortable nail experience.

🎀【Simple Operation】You can change your nail style anytime and anywhere. Just clean your nails, select the appropriate nail size, apply double-sided tape to your nails, and press for 20s. Follow these easy steps to achieve stunning nails in just a few minutes. With normal care, these stick on nails no glue will remain firm and beautiful for several days.

✨【Exquisite Design】Embellished with different patterns, different themes exquisite nails for you to choose. Almond false nails, it's charming and shiny, helping you to express confidence in your daily life and work, meanwhile, enhancing your temperament. You can be different every day. Get ready to turn heads and steal the spotlight with these fake fingernails!

🌈【Versatile Usage】The elegant stick on nails are ideal for professional nail salons, nail art beginners or DIY manicures at home. Whether you want to add flair to your everyday look or attend some special events like parties, weddings, costume balls, Halloween, Christmas, prom, or dating, you can easily find a style that matches your personality and complements any outfit. It is also an ideal gift for a girlfriend, wife, family member or friend.
description: Product description 💁‍♀️ Welcome to our realm of press on nails where fashion meets elegance! 💅 We are dedicated to offering a range of glossy false nails that rival the beauty of salon-manicured nails. 💖 Order now and experience the convenience of stunning nails at your fingertips! Features: A variety of patterns can meet your different needs and make your fingers look more elegant. Medium length press on nails made of high-grade ABS, No toxic, No smell, safe on natural nails and removal is hassle-free. The nail glue sticker is made of high-quality material, strong adhesion can make your own nails and fake nails perfectly bonded. Well-designed french tip glue on nails for your everyday needs - get beautiful quickly and create your own nail art in just a few minutes. Oval false nails are really suitable for dance parties, weekend trips, weddings, parties, Christmas, and Halloween. Specifications: - Product Name: False nail tips - Material: ABS plastic - Application: Finger - Main Color: As the picture shows - Quantity: 24 pcs/box - Package Include: 30pcs stick on nails almond & 24pcs adhesive tabs & 1pcs mini nail file & 1pcs wooden stick How to Apply? Step 1. Gently rub the nail slices with a nail file to remove the surface cuticles, rinse off and keep the nails clean and dry. Step 2. Select the size that best suits your nails, taking an appropriate amount of glue or free jelly glue on the inside of the selected nail plate. Step 3. Press the false nails on your own nails and hold them for 20 seconds. Step 4. Trim according to the shape and length of the press on the nail you want. How to Remove? Soak your nails in warm water and gently peel off the pre-glued nails from the side after a few minutes. Remove the glue stickers and keep the fake nail tip for next time use. Select the size that best suits your nails, taking an appropriate amount of glue or free jelly glue on the inside of the selected nail plate. 3.
